name: PrinterItem
summary: The PrinterItem class contains information about the printers in the Tekla Structures catalog.

constructors.name: PrinterItem
constructors.summary: Creates a new printer item instance.

properties.name: Device
properties.summary: The actual printer device used in the printing.

properties.name: Extension
properties.summary: The printer item's default file extension which is used when printing to a file.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The printer item's name which Tekla Structures uses to fetch all the item's default properties in the printing process.

properties.name: PrintAreaHeigth
properties.summary: The printer item's print area height.

properties.name: PrintAreaWidth
properties.summary: The printer item's print area width.
